creator: kristinacors
caption: Would you move to Ireland though for $80,000? 😏 #travelhack #travelbucketlist #digitalnomadlife #digitalnomadgirl #corporateburnout

transcription.text: Countries paying you to travel. Ireland is paying $80,000 to people who want to start a new life on one of its quiet remote islands. Why are they doing this? Well Ireland's government launched an initiative called Our Living Islands and the goal of this program is to help repopulate island communities by offering grants to people willing to buy and fix up vacant or abandoned island homes to live in it long term. The program applies to inhabited offshore islands without bridges to the mainland which is about 23 to 30 islands. Some of the well-known qualifying islands include these. Another important thing Americans should know is that you can't use this as an immigration program. In order to participate in the program you have to have Irish residency first. So what do you think? Is this a good deal and would you move to Ireland? Tag your travel buddy and follow for more travel hacks and opportunities like this.
